## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue to discuss this change first (for anything beyond a small fix)
- [ ] This change respects the project's [principles](../README.md#principles)
      (Windows-first, no gameplay automation, no input injection, passive
      clipboard/hotkey behavior only, exact arithmetic)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (typecheck + frontend build)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] I've updated [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]` if this is a user-facing change

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything else worth calling out — tradeoffs, things you're unsure about,
follow-up work you intentionally left out.
